Uses of Class
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.AlgorithmContext

Packages that use AlgorithmContext
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.dynamic
Dynamic/noisy optimization EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Primary framework abstractions for algorithms, models, populations and optimization problems.

    Methods in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api with parameters of type AlgorithmContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.afterIteration(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
    Optional hook for algorithm-specific per-iteration behavior.
    void
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.complete(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Map<String,String> artifacts)
    Finalizes the run and emits completion event with artifact pointers.
    protected Fitness
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.evaluateGenotype(AlgorithmContext<G> context, G feasibleGenotype, RngStream evaluationRng)
    Evaluates one feasible genotype.
    void
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.initialize(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
     
    void
    Algorithm.initialize(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Initializes state before iterations start.
    void
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.iterate(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
     
    void
    Algorithm.iterate(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Executes one iteration.
    protected Population<G>
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.postProcessPopulation(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
    Allows algorithm-specific population post-processing after replacement, niching, and restarts (for example random immigrants injection).
    void
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.run(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
     
    void
    Algorithm.run(AlgorithmContext<G> context)
    Runs initialize + iterate loop until stopping condition triggers.
    protected abstract int
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.selectionSize(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> population)
    Returns how many individuals are used for model fitting.
